(e) and (f) of sub-section (2) of Section 35 and clause (c) of Se1:tion 36 of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government nereby makes the following rules further to amend the West Bengal Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1994, namel y:- l. ( I) These rules may be called the West Bengal Pradesh Administrative Tnbunal (Procedure) Amendrnenr Rules. 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their pUb lication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the West Bengal Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1994, in rule: 5, in sub-rule (3), the following proviso shall be inserted, namely:- "Provided that the time allowed by the Registrar to rectify the defects shall not exceed thirty da ys ."
